Container.Name: yoto-sync
Container.Overview: Sync local directories or Plex playlists into Yoto Make-Your-Own cards. Includes optional Plex polling and automatic Yoto display icon resolution from yotoicons.com.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port exposed by the yoto-sync HTTP server.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for OAuth tokens, sync state, and icon cache.

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Optional read-only media path for local-directory syncs or Plex file access.

Config.Name: Sync Config Directory
Config.Description: Optional directory to hold sync-config.json for Plex polling. Leave unused if not needed.

Config.Name: DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY
Config.Description: Required dotenvx private key used to decrypt the committed .env file at startup.

Config.Name: YOTO_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Optional override for the Yoto OAuth client ID. Usually leave blank and use the encrypted .env file.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal application port. Keep aligned with the port mapping above unless you have a specific reason to change it.

Config.Name: DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Internal data path used for state, token, and icon cache storage.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity: fatal, error, warn, info, debug, or trace.

Config.Name: PLEX_URL
Config.Description: Optional Plex server URL. Set together with PLEX_TOKEN to enable Plex playlist syncs.

Config.Name: PLEX_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional Plex authentication token. Required when PLEX_URL is set.

Config.Name: SYNC_CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Optional path to the playlist-to-card mapping file used by the Plex polling scheduler.

Config.Name: POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS
Config.Description: Optional Plex polling interval in seconds. Must be at least 10.
